plugins.name: golden
plugins.description: AI skills for the golden CLI: run and test Postman v2.1 collections from the terminal and CI (pretty/junit/json/tap reporters, exit codes a pipeline can branch on), filter runs by name glob or HTTP method (-X GET = safe read-only sweep), author and debug pm.*/chai test scripts, fire a single request or turn one into a curl, import Postman/OpenAPI/curl/folder sources, export an OpenAPI 3.0 spec from the collections (golden openapi), auto-generate per-service collections (REST + GraphQL, status-check or full) across a corgi-compose.yml / multi-repo workspace, and enable dynamic shell completion of collection/request/env names — all in the git-synced collections/ format shared with the Golden Retriever VS Code extension.
